testcase.name: test_get_cached_intel_returns_200

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/contact-intel/69a0b7095fddcede09591667/69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/contact-intel/69a0b7095fddcede09591667/69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1?

Perhaps you meant https:///api/contact-intel/69a0b7095fddcede09591667/69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1?
